expectations.evidence: Original: ~90 words. Distilled: 30 words. Compression: 67%. Exceeds 60% threshold.
'CLI tool that manages local dev services — databases, queues, caches — through one interface. Starts, stops, and monitors them automatically.' Covers what it is and what it does precisely.
'Built to eliminate onboarding friction and silent environment drift.' Both reasons named explicitly.
Every clause is concrete — specific services named, specific actions listed, specific problems identified. One reading only.
